title: Clock 12 marker brightness is inverted
description: In clock demos, the 12 o'clock marker appears dimmer than other markers; it should be brighter. Update marker color/opacity logic so top marker is brighter by default.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Starting fix: inspect clock marker color defaults and top-marker override path, then make 12 o'clock marker brighter than the rest.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented fix: increased default top marker color intensity so 12 o'clock marker is brighter than other markers. Updated demos/clock_realtime.py default --top-marker-color to rgba(255,0,255,0.8), Storybook TimeNoSecondHand story default to same, and demos/README wording. Validation: ran clock demo on device in push mode; clock rendered and updated normally.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Reopened: awaiting user visual confirmation on real device. Agent will not close visual demo bugs/tests without explicit user confirmation of expected on-screen behavior.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Still in progress during active visual clock validation; no closure until explicit user confirmation.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: User confirmed this is already fixed during manual device validation; closing bug.
